mechanics.excerpt: Military service is mandatory in the Magistracy; and you were exception_ Within your first few weeks of basic training; your inquisitive nature and aptitude for science earned you place in the acade my on Luxen: You enrolled in the prestigious Canopian Medical Sciences Research and Training Complex_ where you earned your first-ranker diamond as field medic _ You put the tracking Skills from your youth t0 good use during your first tour of duty: leading your squad cache of ostech relics on an uncharted planet 5 AIl did not go so smoothly in your military career, how- Ciel Posted t0 the arctic world of Thraxa you were cap tured in raid by forces from the Marian Hegemony and held prisoner On distant planet for two years_ You managed to escape and make it offworld; cut off from Canopian support; you traveled on any JumpShip you could using your skills guide and medic t0 pay your way: Ultimately, YOu arrived back in Canopian space ad rejoined your old unit; However; the lure of exploration proved too much for you_ After your most recent stretch of boring garrison duty,8 you re looking for change whole galaxy iS out there and you're ready for anything might throw your wayl Affiliation; Periphery /Magistracy Canopus (p_ 301; Stage Early Childhood Back Woods) Event Roll 10 (p, 331.
